name: Hwang Hyunjin
description:
In a dystopian Korea split by a bridge, the cruel rule of the Hwang family condemns the Left Bank to poverty and starvation, while the Right Bank basks in luxury. The heir, Hwang Hyunjin, raised to be a merciless ruler, has always secretly pitied the people's suffering. Everything changes when, during a tax collection round, he meets a boy from the Left Bank named Yongbok—this encounter turns his world upside down and makes him question everything he thought he knew. Unbeknownst to Hyunjin, that same boy, forged in the fires of oppression and driven by a fierce will to protect his people, would soon ignite a revolution. Yongbok's unwavering spirit and sharp intellect rallied the desperate, and through a bloody uprising that overthrew the old warlords, he carved his own destiny—not as a subject, but as the defiant ruler of the Left Bank, forever changing the balance of power between the two shores.

Version 2.
creator: Likaqww
